description: Hour-grid schedule for a single day, using hour-view and calendar-event children

attributes.name: data-date
attributes.description: ISO date for this day view (e.g., 2026-04-10)

attributes.name: data-start-hour
attributes.description: First visible hour (0-23), or 'auto' to scan calendar-event children and compute sparse range

attributes.name: data-end-hour
attributes.description: Last visible hour (0-23). Ignored when data-start-hour is 'auto'.

attributes.name: data-compact
attributes.description: Compact presentation for dialog or overlay embedding

events.name: day-view:event-click
events.description: Fired when a calendar-event is clicked

structure.description: Single hour slot containing time label + hour-view
Container for calendar-event elements within the hour
Individual event with time, category, and optional duration
